nodeIdMap.literal: "select #(lf)UPPER(REPLACE(AGENT_NAME,'-','')) AS CLIENT_DIRECTOR,#(lf)TIER,#(lf)UPPER(MANAGER),#(lf)TEAM_TYPE,#(lf)DATE_TARGET,#(lf)MONTHID,#(lf)TARGET_TEAM,#(lf)SELLER_EMAIL,#(lf)concat((UPPER(REPLACE(AGENT_NAME,'-',''))), MONTHID) as AGENT_KEY,#(lf)UNIT_TARGET AS SME_Quota,#(lf)AMV_TARGET AS Revenue_Quota,#(lf)SERVICE_QUOTA,#(lf)BL_TARGET,#(lf)SOFTWARE_QUOTA as Software_Quota#(lf)#(lf)from OPERATIONS_ANALYTICS.TRANSFORMED_PROD.V_SME_UNIT_TARGETS#(lf)#(lf)where YEAR_TARGET >= 2022#(lf)and TEAM_TYPE = 'Accounting'#(lf)and TARGET_TEAM = 'Enterprise'#(lf)AND TIER = 'Client Director'"
